title: Protecting Wildlife for the Future
description: For questions 17 – 24, read the text below. Use the word given in capitals at the end of some of the lines to form a word that fits in the gap in the same line. There is an example at the beginning (0).

content.text: Wildlife conservation is (0) urgently needed, as thousands of species face the threat of permanent loss. Many animals, from insects to large mammals, are now considered (17) endangered due to habitat destruction, hunting, and climate change. Pesticides and pollutants are deeply (18) harmful to birds, insects, and aquatic life, disrupting entire ecosystems. Deforestation causes (19) significant damage to biodiversity hotspots where many unique species live. A more (20) sustainable approach to land use and farming would allow natural habitats to recover. Charities dedicated to (21) conservation efforts work tirelessly to protect rare species and restore damaged environments. One of the most damaging threats to wildlife is the (22) illegal trade in animal products, which continues despite international bans. Protecting nature requires a sense of shared (23) responsibility among governments, businesses, and individuals. Despite the scale of the crisis, there are still (24) hopeful signs, including the recovery of several previously threatened species.

example.text: Wildlife conservation is (0) URGENTLY needed, as thousands of species face the threat of permanent loss. (URGENT)

questions.explanation: An adjective is needed after 'considered'; 'danger' → 'endanger' → 'endangered', meaning 'at risk of extinction'.
An adjective is needed after 'deeply'; 'harm' becomes 'harmful' by adding the suffix '-ful'.
An adjective is needed before 'damage'; 'signify' becomes 'significant' by changing '-ify' to '-icant'.
An adjective is needed before 'approach'; 'sustain' becomes 'sustainable' by adding the suffix '-able'.
A noun is needed before 'efforts'; 'conserve' becomes 'conservation' by replacing '-ve' with '-vation'.
A negative adjective is needed before 'trade'; the prefix 'il-' is added to 'legal' to mean 'against the law'.
A noun is needed after 'shared'; 'responsible' becomes 'responsibility' by changing '-ble' to '-bility'.
An adjective is needed before 'signs'; 'hope' becomes 'hopeful' by adding the suffix '-ful'.
